tasks.label: 📦 Instalar Dependências
tasks.command: source venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '✅ OK'

tasks.label: 🗄️ Verificar Banco de Dados
tasks.command: source venv/bin/activate && python -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect('menuai_test.db'); cur=conn.cursor(); cur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ingredientes'); print('Ingredientes:', cur.fetchone()[0]); cur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fichas_tecnicas'); print('Fichas:', cur.fetchone()[0]); conn.close(); print('✅ Banco OK')"

tasks.label: 🗄️ Corrigir Banco (restaurar backup)
tasks.command: rm -f menuai_test.db-journal menuai_test.db-wal menuai_test.db-shm && [ -f menuai_test.db.backup ] && cp menuai_test.db.backup menuai_test.db && echo '✅ Banco restaurado do backup com sucesso!' || echo '⚠️  Nenhum backup encontrado'

tasks.label: 🧪 Testar API
tasks.command: curl -s http://localhost:8000/ | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || curl -s http://localhost:8000/
